Recommendations.Action: Immediate forced password reset for all 156 users with dark web / paste site credential exposure
Recommendations.Rationale: 156 user credentials are actively circulating on dark web forums and paste sites. Treat as confirmed account compromise.

Recommendations.Action: Enable Entra ID Identity Protection Risky User remediation to auto-block on confirmed breach
Recommendations.Rationale: 322 accounts (64.4%) are confirmed in external breach databases. Manual remediation at this scale is not sustainable.

Recommendations.Action: Priority MFA enforcement and Conditional Access tightening for IT department
Recommendations.Rationale: IT has a 76.7% credential exposure rate — the highest across all departments. CA003 device compliance and CA001 MFA must be enforced immediately.

Recommendations.Action: Enable Entra ID Password Protection with custom banned-password list seeded from breach dumps
Recommendations.Rationale: Credential dump exposure means plaintext or crackable hashes are in the wild. Password Protection blocks re-use of known compromised passwords at authentication time.

Recommendations.Action: Audit for username/password reuse across personal and work accounts
Recommendations.Rationale: DeHashed records (144 users) include usernames and bcrypt hashes. Credential stuffing against Microsoft 365 login is a real risk.

Recommendations.Action: Deploy Microsoft Sentinel UEBA to correlate OSINT exposure with sign-in anomalies
Recommendations.Rationale: Cross-referencing dark web exposure with unusual sign-in patterns (new location, device, time) allows early detection of account takeover in progress.

Recommendations.Action: Integrate OSINT checks into the joiner provisioning workflow (pre-hire screening)
Recommendations.Rationale: Proactive breach screening at onboarding prevents new hires from bringing compromised credentials into the MediZuva environment.

Recommendations.Action: Notify 109 users found in HIBP to change passwords immediately
Recommendations.Rationale: HIBP exposes breach membership publicly. Targeted user notifications with mandatory password reset prevent further compromise.

Recommendations.Action: Schedule automated monthly OSINT re-scans — CI pipeline already supports this via osint.yml
Recommendations.Rationale: Breach exposure is dynamic. New leaks surface continuously. Monthly re-scans ensure newly compromised accounts are caught within 30 days.

Recommendations.Action: Enrol all MediZuva domains in HIBP domain monitoring for real-time breach alerts
Recommendations.Rationale: HIBP domain monitoring notifies the security team within hours of a breach affecting @micrlabs.onmicrosoft.com — no manual re-scan needed.
